summary: Adjusted the opening to tie more directly to the prior hangar aftermath, named Miriam in Faye's collarbone beat to strengthen the handoff into chapter 7, and added a light pre-dawn bridge at the close.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence around the post-chase shutdown to connect more cleanly to chapter 5 and avoid mirroring chapter 7's ship-state opening shape.
Named Miriam in Faye's bathroom reflection so the collarbone memory hands off more explicitly into the next chapter.
Added a brief line that makes morning feel imminent, supporting Faye's early departure in chapter 7.
